title: Accessible progress bar component with multiple display modes
purpose: Provides a customizable progress bar that supports determinate and indeterminate states, multiple color schemes, and optional percentage display with dark mode support.
module_context: Exports a ProgressBar React component with comprehensive props for styling and behavior control, including support for indeterminate animations, striped patterns, and dark mode themes.

steps.content: Normalize the input value to ensure it stays within the valid range defined by min and max.
Calculate the percentage representation of the current value relative to the maximum.
Determine the appropriate color classes based on the specified color variant.
Apply striped and animated classes conditionally based on the component props.
Render the progress bar container with appropriate ARIA attributes for accessibility.
Display either an indeterminate or determinate progress bar based on the indeterminate prop.
Show optional label and percentage display when requested by the props.
Include CSS animation definitions for the indeterminate progress bar effect.
